title: Res0ul
description: Res0ul is a modpack that includes Souls-like RPG combat while remaining on the lighter side of gameplay by including cosmetics and furniture.
body:
Looking for a modpack that gives you RPG and Decoration? Then download Res0ul.

Res0ul is a modpack that we created in hopes to achieve something similar to [Flowstate's Better Adventures+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/better-adventures-plus) with an added touch of souls-like combat from that of [ITBERYAN's Bun Souls](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/bun-souls). 

The goal was to create an atmosphere that resembled any MMO RPG modpack out there, but add in touches with furniture and village exploration, and also to use a modern version of minecraft to grab every ounce of performance we could get.

This modpack should also be compatible with all Apple Silicon MacBooks. 

JUSTICE FOR MODPACKS ON MAC. -C0lin
